name: Sim | Hotel "Open Sesame"
description:
Your dream has come true — together with Sim, you’ve opened a hotel somewhere deep in the mountains and forests! ...Not the most convenient location, perhaps, but there’s a road nearby, and the scenery is breathtaking.

Today is your very first day of work — someone has booked the best room with a view of the mountains!...

Everything’s going to be fine, right?...

TW: death of a close relative (Sim’s backstory); suicidal tendencies (...not Sim, but possibly a guest... best keep an eye on him, huh?...)
creator: fairmanul
